name: HqO Tenant Experience API
what_it_does: HqO REST API for tenant experience and commercial real estate engagement platform. Enables AI agents to manage building amenity reservation and service request workflows for tenant engagement, handle visitor management and access coordination for building operations, access tenant satisfaction survey and NPS data for building performance management, retrieve building event and community engagement data for tenant retention, manage retail and food service ordering and scheduling within commercial properties, handle workplace wellness and fitness amenity booking automation, access building communication and notification delivery data, retrieve space utilization and foot traffic analytics for portfolio optimization, manage building pass and credential digital access data, and integrate tenant experience data with property management, leasing, and CRE analytics platforms.
use_cases: Automating amenity reservations from tenant experience agents
Sending building communications from property management agents
Analyzing tenant engagement from leasing retention agents
Managing visitor access from building operations agents
not_for: Residential property management without commercial office building focus
Building automation and control systems without tenant experience context
Simple room booking without commercial real estate tenant engagement
best_when: A commercial real estate landlord or property manager using HqO wants AI agents to automate tenant communication, amenity management, visitor coordination, and engagement analytics for office building portfolios.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant engagement and building access data reveals employee behavior and location patterns in commercial buildings — automated collection must comply with building tenant privacy agreements, GDPR, and CCPA. Visitor data management requires compliant retention and deletion policies.

auth.notes: HqO uses OAuth 2.0. Per-building credentials. Developer documentation at hqo.com. Webhooks for tenant experience events. REST API with JSON. Boston, Massachusetts HQ. Raised $50M+ in funding. Strong in Class A commercial office buildings. Competes with Equiem and Lane for tenant experience platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-building enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-building annual subscription; portfolio pricing for multi-property operators
pricing.notes: Boston, Massachusetts. Founded 2015. Private ($50M+ raised). Tenant experience platform for commercial real estate. 350+ buildings. Strong in Class A office towers and large corporate campuses. HqO Lease focuses on leasing engagement lifecycle. Competes with Equiem and VTS for tenant experience market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per building

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Building access and tenant engagement data reveals occupant behavior and location; automated analysis must comply with tenant privacy agreements and applicable privacy law
Tenant privacy agreements — commercial leases may include tenant data privacy provisions; verify data use rights with tenant agreements before automated engagement analytics
Access control integration — building pass and digital credential features require integration with access control systems (Lenel, Genetec); verify access system compatibility
Building-specific configuration — HqO features are configured per building (amenities, services, retail); API responses vary by building configuration; build per-building configuration discovery
Engagement push notifications — tenant push notifications via HqO app require tenant opt-in; automated mass notifications without consent damage engagement and app adoption
Foot traffic data accuracy — foot traffic analytics depend on beacon/WiFi probe infrastructure; data availability and accuracy vary by building sensor deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Tenant experience and CRE. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2. US/EU. Building access and tenant engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Commercial real estate tenant experience. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Tenant and building access data.
